title: sterlp/eclipse-peon-ai
summary: AI harness for and with Eclipse IDE with the focus on offline LLM with llama.cpp. Build with LangChain4J. Supports Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, unsloth or cloud providers like with OpenA API, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, Mistral, GitHub Copilot. Contributions are highly welcome!

title: Emanuele-Chiummo/llm-wiki-synapse
summary: Self-hosted AI wiki that organizes itself — LLM ingest, knowledge graph, cited chat, Obsidian-compatible vault. FastAPI + React + Tauri.

title: janaador0827-commits/simulacra-forge
summary: Top Autonomous Multi-Agent Dialogue Systems for AI Character Emergence (2026)

title: GiorgosPanagopoulos/evalassist
summary: AI RAG σύστημα για εκθέσεις αξιολόγησης προσωπικού ΕΔ. Ανάκτηση στοιχείων από PDF (ελληνικά, ανά άτομο/περίοδο) για υποβοήθηση αξιολογητή, human-in-the-loop.

title: Henilt31/EchoInk
summary: 🖋️ The Living Notebook - an AI you write to, not chat with. Your ink soaks into the paper and the answer is written back by hand, letter by letter. Tom Riddle diary mode included.

title: dsp-dr/guile-sage
summary: Guile3 implementation of sage AI REPL with Ollama support

title: joshseby-cpu/LLMPro
summary: A native macOS app for fine-tuning local LLMs on Apple Silicon. The Mac equivalent of Unsloth Studio, built on Apple's MLX framework.

title: H5Pro2/Phemex_Strategy_Observer
summary: Live crypto strategy observer for Phemex with market-structure analysis, LLM role review, risk checks, and dashboard UI.

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: Abrechen2/sublarr
summary: Self-hosted subtitle manager & LLM translator for anime and media — *arr-compatible, fully local

title: pavansai20052004-hue/rocmporter-agent
summary: 🔥 AI agent that ports CUDA code to AMD ROCm using local LLMs — FastAPI + React + Ollama | Live: rocmporter-agent.vercel.app

title: piyalidas10/AI
summary: GEN AI Playground : Sample development & integration of Ollama, RAG, Langchain, LagGraph, FastAPI using Docker

title: mrsirquanzo/Sonny
summary: Grounded multi-agent biomedical research and due-diligence agent. No citation, no claim - every finding traces to a real record (PMID, NCT, patent no.) and is verified by a decorrelated model. Runs locally on Ollama, no API key required.

title: richhabits/sam
summary: A free, private, local-first AI assistant that actually does the work — 167 tools, a team of 78 AI agents, 40 rotating free AI brains, 25 skills. Not a chatbot, a doer. It doesn't just answer — it handles it.

title: franklinnweke/seo-studio-research
summary: Reproducible evaluation of self-hosted multimodal models for context-aware web image metadata

title: LiteObject/TypeRight
summary: TypeRight is a Chrome extension that provides real-time, AI-powered grammar checking as you type. It monitors text input fields across web pages and automatically offers natural, grammatically correct alternatives.

title: Trano89/MacCL
summary: Native macOS app for the Claude Code CLI — its full agentic toolset (shell, file edits, search, sub-agents) powered by Anthropic's models or a local Ollama LLM, even one running on another machine.

title: 9t29zhmwdh-coder/MailPilot
summary: Local AI email organizer — offline categorization, IMAP sync, review workflow. Built with Rust + Tauri.

title: bbarit/bbarit-agent-oss
summary: Open-source AI coding agent for your terminal — one Rust binary, 15+ LLM providers, 1,000+ models. A self-hostable Claude Code / Codex CLI alternative (MIT).
